---
title: "Blog"
pagetitle: "Blog — Félix P. Leiva"
description: "Notes on R, Bayesian models, macrophysiology, and reproducible workflows."
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, image, reading-time]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  image-align: right
  image-height: "150px"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

Notes on R, Bayesian thermal-tolerance models, and the occasional reproducibility rant. Most posts are written in Quarto from real R code that you can copy and adapt.
